title: Smoky French Vegan Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole featuring smoky flavors and a crispy, golden crust.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add sliced Cozy and cook until tender.
In a separate bowl, mix crushed Casabe, chopped Smoky French, and shredded Vegan Gratin.
Add cooked Cozy to the bowl and stir in nutritional yeast, salt, and black pepper.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional shredded Vegan Gratin.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
